surface.name: Helios Free Shared Edition + Cloud Portal SQL Editor
surface.selection_basis: The official documentation presents this as the hosted path from account setup to Run a query in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor. It reaches the requested first-success boundary without extending into post-success production work.

entry_point.developer_intent: A Helios Free Shared Edition workspace executes a SQL query in the hosted Cloud Portal SQL Editor.
assumed_prior_state: The developer has no prior SingleStore setup for this journey.
The journey starts at account creation and stops at the first documented successful outcome.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: Query from Cloud Portal SQL Editor
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: A Helios Free Shared Edition workspace executes a SQL query in the hosted Cloud Portal SQL Editor.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The SQL Editor displays a successful result set for the submitted query.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The official documentation leads the developer to: Run a query in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: This is the first observable happy-path result on the selected Helios Free Shared Edition + Cloud Portal SQL Editor surface; later configuration and production hardening occur after success.

prerequisites.requirement: A Free Shared Edition workspace created in Cloud Portal.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to SingleStore Helios Cloud Portal.
primary_path.input: A new developer starting at account creation
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Create a Free Shared Edition workspace and wait until it is available.
primary_path.output: The workspace reports an active state.
primary_path.success_signal: The workspace reports an active state.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Open the workspace SQL Editor and run the getting-started query.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

primary_path.action: Inspect the result grid in Cloud Portal.
primary_path.output: A successful query result is visible.
primary_path.success_signal: A successful query result is visible.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: The path cannot continue until this documented requirement succeeds.

friction_gates.description: The workspace must finish platform-managed provisioning before SQL Editor access.
Free Shared Edition availability can depend on current account and region options.

sources.title: Run a query in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor
sections_used: Run a query in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor
evidence_supported: A Helios Free Shared Edition workspace executes a SQL query in the hosted Cloud Portal SQL Editor.
The SQL Editor displays a successful result set for the submitted query.

uncertainties.question: Does the current fresh-account UI exactly match every navigation label in the documented Run a query in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor path?
uncertainties.impact: Navigation wording may differ while the required outcome and boundary remain the same.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: The official documentation establishes the journey but account-specific UI state can vary.
